title: Shao kahn mace
description:
A new look fot the mace inspired by Shao kahn mace. 
Made by FabichGM
body: ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/147bdeb327ae665f29a21c6099f707386383254f.png) With this texturepack the mace have a new look inspired in shao kahn´s mace Game versions: You can use this texture pack with Vanilla Minecraft or Optifine Cit/ CIT Resew Optifine -> 1.20 - 1.21.4 Vanilla -> 1.21.6 - 26.1 Now you can get the model by renaming any sword or the mace Check my profile for more content ;)
